nodes.label: Vision: Local-First AI Memory OS
nodes.rationale: Defines the overall product mission: a local AI memory and context operating system.

nodes.label: 100% Local Execution
nodes.rationale: Run entirely offline using local models for privacy and autonomy.

nodes.label: Privacy-First Architecture
nodes.rationale: Data never leaves the user's machine.

nodes.label: Persistent Contextual Memory
nodes.rationale: System remembers context across time.

nodes.label: Retrieval-First Intelligence
nodes.rationale: Prefer retrieval over generation to minimize compute.

nodes.label: Minimal LLM Dependency
nodes.rationale: Smaller local models cannot handle heavy computation; offload to deterministic systems.

nodes.label: Graph-Driven Contextual Understanding
nodes.rationale: Use graph relationships to capture context.

nodes.label: Event-Driven Architecture
nodes.rationale: Pipelines triggered by events for responsiveness.

nodes.label: Deterministic Pipelines
nodes.rationale: Predictable software pipelines preferred over agentic complexity for reliability with small local models.

nodes.label: LLM Usage Philosophy
nodes.rationale: Ask 'What absolutely requires reasoning?' instead of 'What can the LLM do?'

nodes.label: Tasks That MUST NOT Use the LLM
nodes.rationale: Lightweight CPU-based deterministic logic removes 70-80% of unnecessary model calls.
nodes.norm_label: tasks that must not use the llm

nodes.label: Tasks That SHOULD Use the LLM
nodes.source_location: Â§5 Tasks That SHOULD Use the LLM
nodes.rationale: Reserve LLM for semantic reasoning only.
nodes.norm_label: tasks that should use the llm

nodes.label: Ingestion Layer
nodes.rationale: Parsers, normalizers, event stream.

nodes.label: Lightweight NLP Layer
nodes.rationale: Entity, topic, sentiment, task, urgency detection.

nodes.label: Embedding Layer
nodes.rationale: Local embeddings + semantic chunking.

nodes.label: Storage Layer
nodes.rationale: SQLite/Postgres + Qdrant + Neo4j.

nodes.label: AI Reasoning Layer
nodes.rationale: LM Studio API, summarization, retrieval, context synthesis.

nodes.label: Frontend
nodes.rationale: Graph UI, dashboard, timeline, semantic search.

nodes.label: LM Studio
nodes.rationale: AI runtime hosting small local models.

nodes.label: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
nodes.rationale: Dedicated embedding model â€” chat LLM should NOT generate embeddings.

nodes.label: BGE-small
nodes.rationale: Dedicated embedding model.

nodes.label: nomic-embed-text
nodes.rationale: Dedicated embedding model.

nodes.label: SQLite (Initial)
nodes.rationale: Initial relational store for metadata, settings, summaries.

nodes.label: PostgreSQL (Future Production)
nodes.rationale: Scalable structured storage and analytics.

nodes.label: Qdrant
nodes.rationale: Vector database for semantic retrieval.

nodes.label: Neo4j
nodes.rationale: Graph database for relationship and topic clustering.

nodes.label: Hot Memory
nodes.rationale: Only Hot Memory should enter the active LLM context window.

nodes.label: Warm Memory
nodes.rationale: Semantic retrieval layer with partial indexing.

nodes.label: Cold Memory
nodes.rationale: Compressed and graph-first archived storage.

nodes.label: Task Orchestrator
nodes.rationale: Centralized orchestration is critical for smaller local models.

nodes.label: AI Budgeting System
nodes.rationale: Cognitive budget prevents overload of small local models.

nodes.label: Priority Scoring Engine
nodes.rationale: Heuristic priority_score = recency + sender + urgency + emotional + project weights.

nodes.label: PHASE 1 â€” Foundation
nodes.rationale: FastAPI, WhatsApp parser, SQLite, LM Studio (2-3 weeks).

nodes.label: PHASE 2 â€” Semantic Layer
nodes.rationale: Qdrant integration, embedding pipeline (2 weeks).

nodes.label: PHASE 3 â€” Graph Intelligence
nodes.rationale: Neo4j integration, topic graphs (3 weeks).

nodes.label: PHASE 4 â€” Intelligence Engine
nodes.rationale: Priority engine, daily digest, insights (3 weeks).

nodes.label: PHASE 5 â€” Frontend UX
nodes.rationale: Dashboard, graph view, timeline, search UI (3 weeks).

nodes.label: PHASE 6 â€” Production Hardening
nodes.rationale: Docker Compose, monitoring, encryption (2 weeks).

nodes.label: Local-Only Security
nodes.rationale: No cloud APIs, sandboxed model execution, encrypted local storage.

nodes.label: Performance Optimization Strategy
nodes.rationale: Address embedding generation, graph traversal, repeated summarization bottlenecks.

nodes.label: Docker Production Deployment
nodes.rationale: Services: frontend, backend, qdrant, neo4j, postgres, scheduler.

nodes.label: Observability
nodes.rationale: Logging and metrics for embeddings, LLM, retrieval, indexing.

nodes.label: MVP Scope Recommendation
nodes.rationale: Reduce complexity; avoid multi-agent and recursive memory loops initially.

nodes.label: Recommended Development Progression
nodes.rationale: Stage 1 search, Stage 2 assistant, Stage 3 reasoning, Stage 4 autonomous.

nodes.label: Final Product Vision
nodes.rationale: Local AI cognitive OS, second-brain platform, enterprise knowledge graph.

nodes.label: Smaller Local Models Constraint
nodes.rationale: System designed for smaller local models running through LM Studio; heavy compute must not be delegated to LLM.
